name: 7.1oz Ribbed Stemmed Cassin Champagne Flute - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of class to your gatherings with this Ribbed Stemmed Cassin Champagne Flute from Threshold™. Made of glass, this champagne flute features a ribbed design that makes your drinks stand out. With a capacity of 7.1 fluid ounces, this champagne flute is great for enjoying a variety of beverages, and it's dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
